data_coverage_summary: Kinetic Open REST API has public documentation that indicates erp records and transaction workflows across customers, items, orders, invoices. Open REST API.
buyer_guidance: Use this API family for ERP record synchronization and business transaction writeback rather than asset or telemetry ingestion. Epicor should be treated as a rest api surface for erp records and transaction workflows.
overview: Public documentation reviewed for Kinetic Open REST API indicates Open REST API. The documented surface aligns with erp records and transaction workflows and covers customers, items, orders, invoices. Asset data is Unsupported. Telemetry data is Unsupported. Writeback is Supported.

available_data.description: The public documentation indicates access to ERP master data and transaction workflows used to synchronize business records across manufacturing systems.
data_points: Customer, supplier, and account master records
Business workflow state and integration metadata

ingest_considerations: The public source for Kinetic Open REST API is documentation-oriented, so live access still depends on vendor-issued credentials, tenant configuration, or customer enablement.
This row is modeled as erp records and transaction workflows, so downstream integrations should scope data collection and writeback around those documented business workflows.
No exact public machine-readable JSON or YAML artifact was confirmed during this pass, so the documentation URL remains the primary evidence anchor.
